texto: I believe that when you step into uncharted territory, you are also stepping into total abandonment, potential humiliation, and a space where nothing is guaranteed; there’s no case study or roadmap. I have so much respect for anybody who will step away from what they can do in order to find what they must do. That’s a hallmark characteristic of entrepreneurs and artists. And it’s scary and exciting as all hell.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Elle Luna sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “I believe that when you step into uncharted territory, you are also stepping into total abandonme…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, ambiguity, art, útil em momentos de estudos e viagem.
